typeLine: Potent Prismatic Tincture of the Unleashed
implicitMods: 153% increased Elemental Damage with Melee Weapons
explicitMods: Melee Weapon Damage Penetrates 25% Elemental Resistances
descrText: Right click to activate. Only one Tincture in your belt can be active at a time. Mana Burn causes you to lose 1% of your maximum Mana per stack per second. Can be deactivated manually, or will automatically deactivate when you reach 0 Mana.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Charges at a targeted location or enemy, pushing away enemies in your path and repeatedly dealing off-hand damage in a small area in front of you. 8 to 12 Added Physical Damage per 15 Armour or Evasion Rating on Shield

100% more Damage with Hits at Maximum Charge Distance
